title: Workflow Complexity Reduction System
description: Prevent over-engineering and maintain simple, effective workflows

simplificationStrategies.description: Split large workflows into smaller, focused ones
simplificationStrategies.implementation: Create separate workflows for different functions

simplificationStrategies.description: Extract common functionality into reusable subworkflows
Reduce nested if statements and complex branching
simplificationStrategies.implementation: Use switch nodes and simplify logic

simplificationStrategies.description: Remove duplicate nodes and unnecessary transformations

bestPractices: Start simple and add complexity only when needed
Use descriptive node names and comments
Document the workflow purpose and expected outcomes
